title: Climate change
text: Disclose: GHG emissions Scope 1/2/3 by category 1-15, transition plan compatible with 1.5°C, climate-related targets including time-bound SBTi-aligned targets for 2030 and 5-year steps, physical and transition risks, financial effects from material climate-related risks, energy consumption + mix, gross GHG intensity per net revenue.

title: Pollution
text: Disclose: pollution of air/water/soil, substances of concern + substances of very high concern (SVHC) per REACH, micro/nanoplastic emissions, pollutant releases per substance + receiving environment, pollution-related financial effects.

title: Water and marine resources
text: Disclose: water consumption + withdrawals + discharges by basin, operations in water-stressed areas (WRI Aqueduct baseline), incidents of water pollution, dependencies on water ecosystems, financial effects from water risks.

title: Biodiversity and ecosystems
text: Disclose: material impacts on biodiversity and ecosystems, operations in/near Key Biodiversity Areas (KBA) and protected areas, drivers of biodiversity loss (land use change, climate, pollution, invasive species, direct exploitation), no-deforestation commitments, biodiversity-related targets, financial effects.

title: Resource use and circular economy
text: Disclose: resource inflows (recycled content, sustainably sourced), resource outflows (products + materials, waste), circular economy strategy, financial effects from resource scarcity. Targets aligned with EU Circular Economy Action Plan.

title: Own workforce
text: Disclose: characteristics of employees, working hours, adequate wages, social dialogue, freedom of association, collective bargaining agreement coverage, training and skills development, health and safety, work-life balance, diversity + non-discrimination, persons with disabilities, harassment + violence.

title: Workers in the value chain
text: Disclose: characteristics of value-chain workers, working conditions, equal treatment + opportunities, child labour, forced labour, adequate housing, water and sanitation, privacy, grievance mechanisms accessible to value-chain workers, remediation.

title: Business conduct
text: Disclose: corporate culture, protection of whistleblowers, animal welfare (where material), political engagement and lobbying activities, management of relationships with suppliers (including payment practices), incidents of corruption or bribery + outcomes.

title: EU Deforestation Regulation
text: Operators placing on the EU market or exporting from the EU relevant commodities (cattle, cocoa, coffee, palm-oil, rubber, soy, wood) + their derived products must demonstrate the products are: deforestation-free (no deforestation since 31 Dec 2020), produced in accordance with the relevant legislation of the country of production, and covered by a due-diligence statement. Plot-level geolocation required.

title: EU Conflict Minerals Regulation (2017/821)
text: Importers of tin, tantalum, tungsten, and gold (3TG) from conflict-affected and high-risk areas (CAHRA) must conduct OECD-aligned 5-step due diligence. Step 1: establish strong management systems. Step 2: identify and assess risks. Step 3: design and implement strategy to respond to risks. Step 4: third-party audit of supply chain DD. Step 5: report on supply chain DD.
